summary: Phase C admin (AI logs + billing depth + MRR) — backend 28/28 passing, frontend 8/8 page checks passing. One minor frontend bug: decoder-log row click navigates to /admin/users/undefined because statement docs lack uploaded_by/participant_name; the Link target should be conditional or resolved via household_id.

ui_bugs.issue: Participant column always renders a <Link to=/admin/users/${s.uploaded_by}>; statement documents in DB have uploaded_by=null and participant_name=null, so clicking lands on /admin/users/undefined which 404s. Either render plain text when uploaded_by is null, OR have the backend resolve uploaded_by from household_id→primary user, OR hydrate participant_name from the linked household.

issues: Non-fatal React warning observed at login: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' — likely a setState-during-render in AdminAuthContext or the login form; doesn't break flow but worth fixing for cleanliness.

action_items: Fix AdminDecoderLog participant link: skip <Link> wrapper when s.uploaded_by is falsy, OR backfill statements with uploaded_by/participant_name, OR resolve via household primary user in backend.
Investigate React setState-in-render warning during admin login (AdminAuthContext / AdminLogin) — cosmetic.
critical_code_review_comments: decoder-log endpoint correctly drops file_b64/raw_text/audit/line_items in list projection — good.
anomaly-log $facet pipeline correctly returns unwound rows + total + stats_30d — clean implementation.
mrr-trend uses 30-day stride (target = now - 30*i days) — labels may drift over long windows (e.g. month boundaries) but acceptable for an approximate trend chart.
mark-refund-processed correctly returns 404 for unknown/already-processed refunds and writes an audit_log entry — matches spec.
_enrich_with_user does N+1 user lookups per row; fine at current scale (≤page_size=50) but consider a single $in lookup if pagination grows.
Refunds collection 'Stripe call deferred' is documented in the UI banner — MOCKED behaviour clearly disclosed.
test_credentials: Admin: hello@techglove.com.au / AdminPass!2026 + TOTP from db.users.totp_secret. User: cathy@example.com / testpass123.
seed_data_creation: Test inserted one transient db.refunds doc with id prefix TEST_ for mark-processed flow; cleaned up in teardown_module. No persistent seed data created. db.llm_calls untouched (tool-stats showed empty buckets as expected).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C suite at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_phase_c.py covers all 7 Phase C endpoints + auth gating (28 tests). Admin TOTP secret read live from db.users.totp_secret via pyotp. Teardown resets failed_login_count + removes TEST_ refunds. For UI, the decoder-log row navigation currently produces /admin/users/undefined — fix is on main agent.
rca of the issue: AdminDecoderLog row click → 404: is rendered unconditionally. Statement documents in test DB have uploaded_by=null (legacy seed data predating the field). Frontend should guard the Link with `s.uploaded_by ? : …`, or backend decoder-log should populate uploaded_by from household_id→primary user lookup.
